title: oldenlandia rotundifolia
intro: Oldenlandia rotundifolia, also known as Round-leaved Oldenlandia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Oldenlandia rotundifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects, which have been shown to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Oldenlandia rotundifolia include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
